    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    E

    editButton - Variable in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Button to edit the selected expense row.
    editExpense(int, double, int) - Method in class app.App
    Updates the amount and category of an existing expense.
    editExpense(int, double, int) - Method in class control.ExpenseManager
    Updates the amount and category of an existing expense.
    enablePinCheckBox - Variable in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Checkbox to enable or disable PIN lock.
    endCycle() - Method in class control.CycleManager
    Marks the current cycle as CycleStatus.ENDED without deleting it.
    endDate - Variable in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Last day of the budget cycle (inclusive).
    endDay - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Day spinner for the cycle end date.
    ENDED - Enum constant in enum class domain.CycleStatus
    Cycle has been ended or reset by the user.
    endMonth - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Month spinner for the cycle end date.
    endYear - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Year spinner for the cycle end date.
    ERROR - Static variable in class util.AppColors
    Error/warning text colour — red used for validation messages.
    errorLabel - Variable in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Label used to surface validation error messages.
    errorLabel - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Label used to surface validation error messages.
    EXHAUSTED - Enum constant in enum class domain.CycleStatus
    User has spent 100 % or more of the total allowance.
    Expense - Class in domain
    Represents a single expense transaction logged by the user.
    Expense(double, int, int) - Constructor for class domain.Expense
    Constructs a new Expense and stamps it with the current date and time.
    ExpenseLoggingScreen - Class in ui
    Screen that allows the user to log a new expense.
    ExpenseLoggingScreen(App) - Constructor for class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Constructs the ExpenseLoggingScreen.
    expenseManager - Variable in class app.App
    Manages expense and category CRUD operations.
    ExpenseManager - Class in control
    Coordinates expense and category operations, delegating persistence to DatabaseHelper and triggering budget alerts via AlertManager.
    ExpenseManager() - Constructor for class control.ExpenseManager
    Constructs an ExpenseManager and initialises its collaborators.
